---
<<<<<<< HEAD
title: "About Me"
=======
title: "About You"
>>>>>>> 173b0ea04efe5211bb32ae59942a8440eaaa8396
---

# About Me

<<<<<<< HEAD
Hello, I’m Saori Kikuchi.

I am interested in data science, machine learning, and solving real-world problems using data.

## Career Goals

I aim to become a machine learning engineer and contribute to building practical AI systems.
=======
Hello, I’m [Your Name].

I am interested in data science, machine learning, and solving real-world problems using technology.

## Career Goals

I aim to become a machine learning engineer and build practical AI systems.
>>>>>>> 173b0ea04efe5211bb32ae59942a8440eaaa8396
